room.caption: [IceWindCaveB] A soft cool breeze though, there's that. Too bad no one likes wind.

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="Why would you stop here? Just to read this sign?#You do know there's an Advancing Wall of Death here, right?" signSize=2
stringToShow="I lied about the advancing wall... sorry.#Sorry about the lack of ice as well." signSize=1
sprite_index=sNormalDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=608 newMapY=192 toRoom=rIceWindCaveA
